assertionResults.title: Window close cleans up pending OPS state

steps.action: Open app in isolated agent-browser session, install explicit WebSocket close-event capture hook, and seed runtime via DEV hook (__iglooTestSeedRuntime) on ws://127.0.0.1:8194
steps.expected: Live relay connection with in-flight pending operation before close/navigation-away
steps.observed: runtimeRelays showed ws://127.0.0.1:8194 online; pending_operations contained in-flight Ping request_ids b14f6c6e59290d6e86750df043c6a70d and fb047c6af0f1a096694c6d30ecbf3975

steps.action: Navigate away (about:blank) to trigger unload cleanup, then reopen app in the same browser session
steps.expected: Relay socket closes cleanly with close code 1000/1001 and close-frame evidence is observable after reopen
steps.observed: __debug.relayHistory after reopen contained only open entries; explicit close-event hook captured close code 1006 (wasClean=false), not 1000/1001

steps.action: Reseed same runtime identity from session seed after reopen and compare against pre-close pending request_ids
steps.expected: Fresh runtime starts with no stale pending operations from closed session
steps.observed: pendingImmediately was []; stalePresent=[] (pre-close request_ids did not reappear)

evidence.network: agent-browser network requests had no WS-frame telemetry; explicit WebSocket close hook captured close event code=1006 (wasClean=false) during navigation-away

assertionResults.issues: Pending cleanup semantics were observed, but required clean close-frame evidence (1000/1001) was not met; observed close event was 1006 abnormal closure.

frictions.description: agent-browser network capture did not expose websocket frame-level close telemetry for this run.
frictions.resolution: Added explicit in-page WebSocket close-event capture hook as backup evidence attempt.
